artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report covering Springer template requirements, JAR submission guidelines, directory structure recommendations, and notation adaptation strategy
5-phase implementation plan for setting up ModelChecker/latex/ directory with Springer Nature JAR template

active_projects.completion_summary: Created LaTeX paper directory with Springer Nature template v3.1 configured for Journal of Automated Reasoning. Includes paper.tex skeleton, comprehensive README.md with journal requirements and submission checklist, and latexmkrc build configuration. Document compiles cleanly to 2-page PDF.
